'''Mussubir Three''', or simply '''Mussubir''', was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Mussubir system/Legends|Mussubir system]] of the [[Senex sector/Legends|Senex sector]], in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] of the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]. It was an important industrial world controlled by [[House Araba]].<ref name="TEA" />

The [[Governor/Legends|governor]] was allied with [[Roganda Ismaren/Legends|Roganda Ismaren]]. He disappeared on 'vacation' in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]].
